title: Board activity log for when a board is changed type (Private/Shareable/Main)
excerpt: It would be amazing if we could get a record of when the board type is changed in the boards activity. During migrations the number of boards we need to change for the client can be very large. Unless we take screenshots…

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be amazing if we could get a record of when the board type is changed in the boards activity. During migrations the number of boards we need to change for the client can be very large. Unless we take screenshots of the navigation pane each time (easy to forget), we can’t determine what type the board was.
